maintain a home. 

EXAMPLE 1: 

A home health aide visits a recovering stroke patient whose right side weakness and poor 
endurance cause her to be able to leave the bed and chair only with extreme difficulty. 
The physician has ordered physical therapy and speech-language pathology services for 
the patient and home health aide services three or four times per week for personal care,
